name: Fried Chicken and Pan Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, and black pepper in a large, brown grocery bag.
2. Add chicken pieces to the bag one at a time, shaking vigorously to coat them well.
3. Fry the chicken uncovered in about 1/4 inch of oil for approximately 45 minutes until golden brown.
4. Remove from the oil and drain excess oil on paper towels, leaving about 3 tablespoons.
5. Brown an equal amount of flour in the remaining oil.
6. Gradually whisk in 1 cup (or more) of milk into the hot oil with the flour.
7. Serve immediately over cooked rice or mashed potatoes.
This was how my grandmother made fried chicken and it was indisputably the BEST in the world! I do it exactly as she did, but still can't get it that good... This should make a nice, crispy batch of chicken. If you cover while frying, it will probably come out soggy.
